## Use Case

What problem do you want to solve with GoalfyData?

## Data Sources

Where does your data come from?

- [ ] CSV / Excel
- [ ] API
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Business system
- [ ] Agent-generated data
- [ ] Other:

## What Should the Agent Do?

For example: analyze data, generate reports, update dashboards, detect anomalies, preserve business rules, or reuse governed context.

## Does It Need Continuous Updates?

- [ ] Scheduled refresh
- [ ] Manual update
- [ ] Not sure yet

## Who Needs Access?

- [ ] Team members
- [ ] Clients
- [ ] Other agents
- [ ] Public sharing
- [ ] Not sure yet

## Additional Context

You can add screenshots, sample data structures, your current workflow, or the expected output.
